nodes.title: New Game
nodes.description: Given SaveManager, when NewGame(startLocationId) is called, then a new GameProgress is created with CurrentLocationId set, startLocation added to VisitedLocationIds and UnlockedLocationIds.

nodes.title: Save Checkpoint
nodes.description: Given an active game, when SaveCheckpoint(locationId) is called, then CurrentLocationId updates, locationId is added to VisitedLocationIds and UnlockedLocationIds, and data persists to PlayerPrefs.

nodes.title: Unlock Location
nodes.description: Given an active game, when UnlockLocation(locationId) is called, then locationId is added to UnlockedLocationIds. IsUnlocked(locationId) returns true.

nodes.title: Progress JSON Roundtrip
nodes.description: Given a GameProgress with various fields set, when ToJson() then FromJson() are called, then all fields (CurrentLocationId, VisionIndex, VisitedLocationIds, UnlockedLocationIds) are preserved.

nodes.title: Has Visited Query
nodes.description: Given locations have been visited via SaveCheckpoint, when HasVisited(locationId) is called, then returns true for visited locations and false for unvisited ones.

nodes.title: Mark Ever Had Hunger
nodes.description: Given an active game, when MarkHasEverHadHunger() is called, then CurrentProgress.HasEverHadHunger is set to true and persists across saves.

nodes.title: Increment Elde Hits
nodes.description: Given an active game, when IncrementEldeHitsAccrued() is called, then CurrentProgress.EldeHitsAccrued increases by 1.

nodes.title: Increment Green Chapel Bodies
nodes.description: Given an active game, when IncrementGreenChapelBodies() is called, then CurrentProgress.GreenChapelBodies increases by 1.

nodes.title: Increment Otherworld Bodies
nodes.description: Given an active game, when IncrementOtherworldBodiesFromDeath() is called, then CurrentProgress.OtherworldBodies increases by 1.

nodes.title: Increment Otherworld Living
nodes.description: Given an active game, when IncrementOtherworldLivingCharacters() is called, then CurrentProgress.OtherworldLivingCharacters increases by 1.

nodes.title: Ethical Misstep Counter
nodes.description: Given an active game, when an ethical misstep occurs, then CurrentProgress.EthicalMisstepCount increases. This counter persists and affects the damage-taken multiplier.

nodes.title: Green Knight Flags
nodes.description: Given an active game, when Green Knight appearance flags are set (GreenKnightWillAppearRandomly, etc.), then they persist across save/load cycles.

nodes.title: Damage Taken Multiplier
nodes.description: Given a player with ethical missteps, when GetDamageTakenMultiplier() is called, then returns a multiplier > 1.0 that increases with EthicalMisstepCount, making combat harder for morally compromised players.

nodes.title: Godot SaveService (Steam retail paths)
nodes.description: Cross-engine trace: same logical progress fields as Progress JSON roundtrip; Godot uses ConfigFile (kyndeblade_save.cfg + autosave + settings) with legacy kyndeblade_demo_* migration. Proof: KyndeBlade_Godot/tests/run_headless_tests.gd. TDAD workflow: godot-steam-build. Doc: KyndeBlade_Godot/STEAM_BUILD.md.
